narrative:
Sylvania Township has 37,986 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
